description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU CI that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and manually. The workflow has three jobs: build_and_test_amd, test_amd_gpu, and build_and_test_cpu. Each job runs on a matrix of different environments, including various Ubuntu versions, Python versions, and ROCm versions. The jobs set up build containers, check out the repository, display system and GPU info, free disk space, and then perform various installation, build, and test steps specific to each job.
